name: Quanex Building Products CORP
business: Quanex manufactures and distributes engineered components for original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) in the building products industry, including window, door, solar, refrigeration, custom mixing, building access, and cabinetry markets. The company primarily serves customers in North America and the U.K., with additional international operations in Germany, Mexico, Canada, and Italy. It uses cost-effective production processes and engineering expertise to provide specialized products for specific customer applications.
sellsTo: national and regional residential window, door and cabinet manufacturers and distributors
OEMs, system houses, and distributors in the U.K. and Europe

exposures.sentence: We believe the primary drivers of our operating results are residential remodeling and replacement activity and new home construction in the markets we serve.

In addition, we provide certain other components and products, which include solar panel sealants, trim moldings, vinyl decking, water retention barriers, conservatory roof components, and commercial access solutions.

We currently manufacture and distribute components for original equipment manufacturers (OEM) in the building products industry, including window, door, solar, refrigeration, custom mixing, building access, and cabinetry markets.
